title: 2 arrested after man stabbed to death
description: GEORGE NEWS - Conville police arrested two...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - Conville police arrested two juveniles, aged 15 and 17, in connection with the death of a 23-year-old-man in Canary Street, Rosemoor today, Saturday 31 August.

Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies confirmed that circumstances surrounding the killing are being investigated.


> "According to reports available at this stage, police were dispatched to the scene at about 08:45 following a complaint of a stabbing.


"On arrival the  members found the man with a stab wound to the chest. The victim was declared dead by paramedics on scene," said Spies.

He said the motive is still to be determined. "It forms part of the ongoing police investigation. The pair remain in police custody. They will appear in court once charged."

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
